rationale: Educ. Code §21.306 prohibits ex parte communications by the commissioner and agency staff. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner and the staff of the agency may not communicate with any party or any party's representative in connection with any issue of fact or law except on notice and opportunity for each party to participate.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this ex parte communications rule.
